PROFILE.NO_ORDERS: You haven't placed any orders yet.

ADDRESS.CONFIRM_DELETE: Are you sure you want to delete this address?

FAQS.A1: Our items are restocked weekly. If an item is out of stock, you can subscribe to our "Newsletter" to receive a notification when it becomes available again.
FAQS.A2: You can manage your personal data, addresses and orders from the "My Account" section after logging in.
FAQS.A3: You have 30 days to make returns for free through our network of drop-off points or by requesting home collection.
FAQS.A4: All our products have undergone quality controls to offer the best experience, however if you find any defect in your product, do not hesitate to contact our customer service team.
FAQS.A5: You can pay for your purchases with credit or debit card, PayPal or bizum.
FAQS.A6: Shipping options may vary depending on the delivery address, the time you place your order and the availability of the items. At the time of processing your order we will show you the available shipping methods, the cost and the estimated delivery date. Keep in mind that deliveries are made only on business days.
